falsification_conditions.condition: The price breaks above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by indicating a confirmed trend reversal

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff momentum would contradict the current 'HOLD' by confirming an overbought condition

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern similarity to bottom_2024_aug drops below 60% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A divergence from the historical pattern would invalidate the current verdict by showing the scenario is no longer analogous

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
